---
title: "Research"
description-meta: "Research, projects and presentations by Matías Deneken."
page-navigation: true
toc: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="research-shell">
  <header class="page-header-minimal" data-lang="en">
    <h1 class="page-title-minimal">Research</h1>
  </header>

  <header class="page-header-minimal" data-lang="es" style="display:none;">
    <h1 class="page-title-minimal">Investigación</h1>
  </header>

  <section class="page-wrap" data-lang="en">
    <div class="page-content">
      <div class="research-section">
        <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Research</h2>
        <div class="coming-soon-box">
          <p class="coming-soon-text">Coming soon</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="research-section">
        <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Projects</h2>
        <div class="coming-soon-box">
          <p class="coming-soon-text">Coming soon</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="research-section">
        <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Presentations</h2>
        <div class="coming-soon-box">
          <p class="coming-soon-text">Coming soon</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="page-wrap" data-lang="es" style="display:none;">
    <div class="page-content">
      <div class="research-section">
        <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Investigación</h2>
        <div class="coming-soon-box">
          <p class="coming-soon-text">Próximamente</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="research-section">
        <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Proyectos</h2>
        <div class="coming-soon-box">
          <p class="coming-soon-text">Próximamente</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="research-section">
        <h2 class="section-title-minimal">Presentaciones</h2>
        <div class="coming-soon-box">
          <p class="coming-soon-text">Próximamente</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>

<style>
.research-shell {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 2rem 1rem;
}

.research-section {
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
}

.coming-soon-box {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(139, 124, 248, 0.08) 0%, rgba(244, 114, 182, 0.08) 100%);
  border: 1px solid rgba(139, 124, 248, 0.2);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 3rem 2rem;
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.coming-soon-text {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--ink-muted, #52526a);
  margin: 0;
  font-style: italic;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .research-shell {
    padding: 1.5rem 1rem;
  }

  .coming-soon-box {
    padding: 2rem 1rem;
  }

  .coming-soon-text {
    font-size: 1.25rem;
  }
}
</style>
```
